name: copilot-agent-codebase
description: "Quick reference for copilot-agent file structure. Use when navigating or editing files in this n8n Copilot node project."
applyTo: "**"
---

# Copilot Agent Codebase Map

## Core Entry Point
- **`index.ts`** — Package entry point; exports the node and credential types for n8n to discover.

## Node Implementation
- **`nodes/CopilotAgent/CopilotAgent.node.ts`** — Main node class; implements the n8n INodeType interface with execute(), loadOptions(), and UI configuration.
- **`nodes/CopilotAgent/methods.ts`** — Helper methods and pure functions used by the node (e.g., session management, validation, config building).
- **`nodes/CopilotAgent/session.ts`** — Session lifecycle utilities (create, disconnect, error handling).
- **`nodes/CopilotAgent/config.ts`** — Type definitions and configuration helpers for the Copilot SDK client.
- **`nodes/CopilotAgent/CopilotAgent.json`** — Node UI metadata (parameters, display options, categories).

## Credentials
- **`credentials/CopilotAgent.credentials.ts`** — Credential type definition for n8n (PAT and server token auth modes).

## Configuration & Build
- **`package.json`** — Package metadata, dependencies, build scripts, n8n plugin configuration.
- **`tsconfig.json`** — TypeScript compiler settings.
- **`eslint.config.mjs`** — ESLint rules for code quality.
- **`.prettierrc.js`** — Code formatting (Prettier) configuration.

## Scripts & Setup
- **`scripts/postinstall.js`** — Post-installation cleanup (handles native module issues in Docker).

## Docker
- **`docker/Dockerfile.copilot-cli`** — Docker image for the Copilot CLI server container.
- **`docker/Dockerfile.n8n-custom`** — Docker image for n8n with the custom node installed.
- **`docker/docker-compose.yml`** — Multi-container development setup (n8n + CLI server).

## Documentation
- **`docs/local_docker_setup.md`** — Instructions for local Docker development.
- **`README.md`** — Project overview, features, installation, authentication, and usage.

## Release & Governance
- **`CHANGELOG.md`** — Version history and release notes.
- **`CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md`** — Community guidelines.
- **`LICENSE.md`** — MIT license.
